title: Bigger Lightning Storms
description: Increases the intensity of lightning storms in your world
body:
If you are looking to add bone-chilling thrill into your Minecraft world, this mod is for you!

During lightning storms, lightning bolts will spawn significantly more often and you will not be able to skip them by sleeping in a bed (1.12.2 only)

![Storm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76e9dfd68d6aa290af0506d982e508796007cb9e.webp)
